arts.ttl: Chelsea ‘agree’ world record transfer fee for USA star
arts.sum: Chelsea Women are set to bolster their already impressive squad after reportedly agreeing a world record transfer fee for Naomi Girma. The USWNT defender is on the verge of moving to west London after the Blues “agreed to terms” on a $1.1 million (£890,000) deal with NWSL outfit San Diego Wave FC, The Athletic reports. […] The post Chelsea ‘agree’ world record transfer fee for USA star first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Bad news for Christian Pulisic ahead of crucial Champions League game
arts.sum: During his 18 months in Italy Pulisic has largely been deployed on the right wing, albeit with the freedom to drift inside and influence the game. Head coach Sergio Conceicao has confirmed that Pulisic is still struggling with the knock and is very unlikely to play against Girona.

arts.ttl: Conceiçao: “Pulisic Is Back, But I Wouldn’t Want to Risk Him”
arts.sum: AC Milan's head coach Sergio Conceiçao addressed the media in a press conference ahead of the Champions League clash against Girona, providing insights into the team's preparation and mindset. The post Conceiçao: “Pulisic Is Back, But I Wouldn’t Want to Risk Him” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
